flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New River Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at New River Community College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 (15.5% → 17.9%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at New River Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (59.4% → 67.5%).
